forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+---
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '80'
+title: Scaffold RankKit Swift package
+---
+## What
+Create the SwiftPM skeleton per plan.md §3:
+- `Package.swift`: swift-tools 6.1, `platforms: [.macOS("27.0")]`, one library product/target `RankKit` at `Sources/RankKit/`, test target `RankKitTests` at `Tests/RankKitTests/`. One dependency: `.package(url: "https://github.com/swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsRouter", branch: "main")` (remote URL, family CI convention — no local path deps). Use named constants for repeated identifiers, mirroring `../FoundationModelsMetadataRegistry/Package.swift`.
+- `Sources/RankKit/RankKit.swift`: placeholder doc-comment file so the target compiles.
+- `README.md`: short stub (name + one-paragraph purpose; full README comes later).
+- CI workflow calling the family's shared `swift-ci.yaml` reusable workflow — copy the pattern from `../FoundationModelsMetadataRegistry/.github/workflows/`.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `swift build` succeeds on macOS 27 toolchain
+- [ ] `swift test` runs (green, with the package smoke test below)
+- [ ] CI workflow file present and references the shared family workflow
+- [ ] `Package.resolved` committed (pins Router branch dep, per family convention)
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `Tests/RankKitTests/PackageTests.swift`: a trivial smoke test that imports `RankKit` and asserts a placeholder symbol exists (mirror `../FoundationModelsMetadataRegistry/Tests/.../PackageTests.swift`)
+- [ ] Run `swift test` — exits 0
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,4 +1,21 @@
 ---
+comments:
+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01kxdv3brn6a7pf9t5yhyfa1cg
+  text: |-
+    Implemented per plan.md §3/§6 phase 1 step 1 (scaffold only):
+
+    - `Package.swift` — swift-tools 6.1, `platforms: [.macOS("27.0")]`, single library product/target `RankKit` at `Sources/RankKit`, test target `RankKitTests` at `Tests/RankKitTests`, one remote dependency on `FoundationModelsRouter` (branch `main`, no local path dep). Named constants (`packageName`, `routerDependencyName`) mirror `../FoundationModelsMetadataRegistry/Package.swift`'s pattern.
+    - `Sources/RankKit/RankKit.swift` — placeholder doc-comment file so the target compiles.
+    - `Tests/RankKitTests/PackageTests.swift` — TDD smoke test (`moduleImportsAndBuilds`), written first and watched fail (no `Package.swift` existed yet → `swift test` errored "Could not find Package.swift"), then made to pass.
+    - `README.md` — short stub (name, one-paragraph purpose, install snippet), mirroring FMR's README shape.
+    - `.github/workflows/ci.yml` — calls the shared `swissarmyhammer/workflows/.github/workflows/swift-ci.yaml@main` reusable workflow, copied from FMR's `.github/workflows/ci.yml`.
+    - `Package.resolved` — generated by `swift build`, pins `FoundationModelsRouter` to branch `main` plus transitive deps.
+
+    Verification: `swift build` exit 0, `swift test` green (1 test, 0 failures). Adversarial double-check agent independently ran build+test and confirmed PASS, verified Package.swift matches plan.md §3 exactly, confirmed no changes to sibling repos CodeContextKit/FoundationModelsMetadataRegistry (their own dirty working trees predate and are unrelated to this task).
+
+    All acceptance criteria met. Leaving in `doing` for `/review`.
+  timestamp: 2026-07-13T13:36:39.189955+00:00
 position_column: doing
 position_ordinal: '80'
 title: Scaffold RankKit Swift package
